title: Will UAE enter Iran war? Abu Dhabi pushes US, allies to reopen Strait of Hormuz by force
summary_full: The UAE is reportedly considering military intervention against Iran, a significant shift from its previous neutral stance.  Repeated Iranian attacks and the disruption of the vital Strait of Hormuz have pushed Abu Dhabi to explore options, including supporting US-led efforts to reopen the oil route. This move carries substantial risks of further retaliation.
